name: Mike Epps
bio: Mike Epps is an American stand-up comedian and actor from Indianapolis whose observational, streetwise comedy grew out of the 1990s Def Comedy Jam circuit. He became a marquee comic actor through the Friday film sequels as Day-Day Jones and roles in The Hangover, and he has released a long run of stand-up specials, several of them on Netflix. He also stars in and produces the Netflix sitcom The Upshaws.

timeline.ev: Joins the Def Comedy Jam tour and appears on HBO broadcasts
Cast as Day-Day Jones in Next Friday
Appears as Black Doug in The Hangover
Releases first Netflix special Dont Take It Personal
Begins starring role on the Netflix sitcom The Upshaws
Releases the Netflix special Ready to Sell Out

accolades: NAACP Image Award for Outstanding Actor in a Comedy Series for The Upshaws (2024)
Multiple Netflix stand-up specials across a decade-long deal
Hosted the BET Hip Hop Awards multiple years

specials.t: Under Rated... Never Faded and X-Rated
